description: EventCreate helps our company create events and track them. It also give our employees and customers a way to look at all of the event details beforehand! It helps track attendees, send reminders automatically, create templates and so much more! This product takes out a lot of manual work - you can run reports of attendees who have and have not RSVP's, you can add custom questions to the RSVP such as dietary restrictions and those will show up on your reports as well. It's simple to use and our employees love it!
author: Daysi H.
pros: EventCreate is user friendly and gives you a space for all of your event needs. It's versatile so that you can host different types of events, but you can keep track of everything in one place. You can customize it as much or as little as you want. I love using this site! I really like the RSVP feature for attendees as well as the fact that you can customize the website with location, hotels, images, and more.
cons: There are some features that could be updated/modified to give more customization options. Like page layouts, colors and photos. There are some features that are amazing, but at the same time are difficult to find every check box to use the feature, so you can get lost or confused in trying to figure out how to set something up a certain way. When setting up your event, there are several tabs and under each tab are many options/checkboxes which is great, but can be tedious and you need to double check everything to ensure it's all exactly how you want it!
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Where has EventCreate Been All My Life?
description: The team was very easy to talk to. We were finishing each other's sentences and were having such a good conversation we went over the scheduled time without realizing it. Once we got access to the paid version, it was so easy that no training was needed. Our first event was up and running in a few hours.
author: Jeff M.
pros: EventCreate is just a natural extension of what I'm doing physically in person. It's intuitive, a clean interface, and super easy to use. It's the Event Management tool I'd create if I were a developer.
cons: Their marketing is poor. I searched several times for EventBrite alternatives and they never showed up. I only found them through a review site.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good enough for my family events
description: I used to have to track everything on a disorganized spreadsheet and now there is a central location to keep track of RSVP’s which helps greatly. It helped connect me to some new friends in this city because I moved here about a year ago and was really struggling to feel connected. It saves volunteers hours of standing at the front of the venue waiting for people to try and pay at the door (which is a nightmare). I simply use it for social media purposes and it will attract attendees.
author: Niketan S.
pros: I've already used this program for several years and as long as it continues to work (it has worked so far), I did get some relief that the Facebook integration didn’t crash on me either. I got to see that my listing was also being viewed by many local parents who were able to view the listing without having to purchase all the additional advertising options.
cons: Every time I have had to go into another design application to edit them. And although I can easily send the data to my other tracking spreadsheets, it still takes way longer than necessary.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Hosting events in EventCreate for more than a year
description: They assisted us in organizing events and gathering registration information from participants. The major downside was the syncing issue with CRM and not supporting multiple stripe accounts.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's easy to set up, and I appreciate that it offers the ability to add custom questions. Reports could be generated to be used for analytics.
cons: hey only allow one Stripe account per user account, which was limiting for our needs. The integration with HubSpot relied on Zapier, resulting in extra costs. Additionally, the number of live events available was quite limited. We also had to manually export event data to our CRM, which was time-consuming. Matching daily Stripe payouts to event registrants proved to be a particularly challenging and tedious process.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: If you're looking to plan an event without all the stress, give EventCreate a try. It was a fantastic experience, and I wouldn’t hesitate to use it again for future events.
author: Haley R.
pros: I recently used EventCreate to set up a small gathering, and I have to say, it was a breeze! The interface is super user-friendly, which made it easy for me to whip up an event website without any technical know-how. I really appreciated how I could customize the templates to fit the vibe of my event, and it saved me so much time. Managing RSVPs was simple too; I got real-time updates, which helped me keep track of who was coming. Plus, the ticket selling feature worked perfectly. I was a bit nervous at first since I’m not the most tech-savvy person, but their responsive support team was there to help whenever I had questions.
cons: If you're considering this tool, just be prepared that the free version might leave you wanting more, and make sure to read the fine print on pricing.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Amazing! Worth It! Best tool in it's class!
description: I think it's fantastic! Great product and great work!
author: Antonio W.
pros: Super user friendly and easy to use and navigate. The page editing tools are straightforward and allow for plenty of customization.
cons: That I have to leave the website builder to create an image gallery, and that I can't upload specific email list to deploy emails/can only deploy emails to registered attendees.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: EventCreate - perfect for small to medium event organizers
description: Fantastic. Will continue to use for all my events.
author: Matt D.
pros: Ease of use, massive functionality at a good price, all kinds of customization.
cons: Conditional logic on registration questions is limited to one to one. No way to pick a language at the start and then conditionally select all following questions based on that selection. Once you use a question in a logic condition, it disappears from the option list on following conditional logic.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It was fantastic. I really enjoyed the easy of it and the ability to manage my event well and i hope it goes well.
author: Jared E.
pros: Very easy to manage and super easy to use. I logged on and made an event in less than an hour. I am thrilled with how it has gone.
cons: The price was maybe a little too expensive for someone using this for a one time event. I would prefer it to be cheaper
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Highly recommend this platform. I had zero issues setting everything up. My experience from start to finish was a breeze.
author: Sharon L.
pros: I loved how easy everything was to set up! I am a rookie to setting up web sites for events. This site made it simple and easy to understand.
cons: Fees are a little on the higher side for my budget. If you factor in the cost, fir what you get, it is definitely worth it though!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great way to manage events and guestlists
description: It was very easy to create an invitation for my high school reunion. We are spread out all over the country, so the ability to track responses is golden!
author: Alyssa C.
pros: Easy to use and has all the features I need for my event. It was very intuitive, and the templates make it very easy.
cons: Can be used for personal events but still very focused on business events. It would be nice to be able to customize the dashboard to not show things that don't apply to the event.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great website & invitation generator with rsvp management
description: Mostly a very good experience but futzed with the title box of the website too much trying to get it correct before finally giving up and using a stock photo. I did really like the fact it was easy to upload photos and I could use one to personalize the invitation email.
author: Dawn B.
pros: I liked the ability to create a unique website, rsvp management, and the checklist. I also like the fact that you can upload your own photos to use for the website AND email.
cons: I intensely disliked the fact that I couldn't move the title of the website within the "box" of the picture/area. I wanted to use a picture of my husband in front of a traditional Japanese tea house while he was in Japan on business but I could only change the spacing, not the actual placement, of the title. Because there were boxes of whiteness in the picture, that were consequently reflected in the pond the tea house was sitting over, I needed the title to be at the very bottom right-hand part of the "Title" box. If I changed the spacing it made the picture do weird things when viewed. I would have liked to be able to treat the text as a true text box and move it around where I needed it to be. I'd also like to be reminded if I want to send an email when after a .cvs file is uploaded. (I uploaded the file, checked everything out and then completely forgot to actually send the email.)
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I am so pleasantly surprised with the functionality, capabilities, customization options and overall user-friendliness of EventCreate! I'm so glad I came across the site (found it via a Google search for online event invitations with RSVP). I am getting so many compliments on our event's landing page, how easy it is to have all the information they need about their event right at their finger tips and RSVP. EventCreate helped me look like a website professional rather than just a party planner. Highly recommend EventCreate over any other online event invite/management systems! Will definitely be using again.
author: Tara K.
pros: The software was very user-friendly. It made it easy to create a beautiful, functional landing page that made it simple to share all the information we wanted to about our upcoming event. It was truly custom to our event. As a marketing professional, being able to brand even a personal event, is amazing! The registration process was also easy to set-up and easy for our attendees to use.
cons: When adding an image to my landing page, it would have been helpful to know the specs for the images so the graphic could be properly formatted to the space. For adding attendees without a spreadsheet, having a simple table that I could manually enter in a list of attendees all at once rather than having to keep hitting the "add attendee" button each time would have been nice.Neither are deal breakers and are mostly just a matter of preference.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Eventbrite Converter - Love the White Glove Customizability!
description: Very positive! It is super customizable and looks professional / sleek. The check-out screen is also very sleek for customers.
author: Kari M.
pros: The sleek look / ease of editing the check-out page. It is so easy to use and you can customize nearly everything.
cons: That there is not an undo button when editing the site.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It took me awhile to get everything just like I wanted and I had a few struggles, but it was free to start with. This site is a great idea and I love that I can monitor the attendees.
author: Kelly B.
pros: Being able to design the page and select colors, fonts, etc. Adding pictures to the page was a definite plus.
cons: Trying to add pictures. Add background image seems to have two meanings. One is a picture behind everything which is truly a background image and the other is just adding a picture even though it also called the function add a background image. This was super confusing.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Overall experience with EventCreate was very positive. Would definitely use again for future events.
author: Maria M.
pros: It was easy to navigate; good flow in setting up everything
cons: Nothing yet; the pricing structure is a little difficult to follow
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: It serves served its purpose for our event. It did allow us to create Website and a schedule fairly easily. It had decent functionality for a class reunion. The reports were not everything I wanted them to be.
author: Dianne C.
pros: It enabled me to do a multi event registration for a reunion event.
cons: For lack of a better term, it's kind of clunky. It doesn't enable the user to create any kind of a static, it's not easy to navigate with regard to embedding links and it's not cheap.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Awesome! I needed a free tool for an important event and was saved!
author: Jacqui P.
pros: The online tutorials walk you through every question, great tool for inviting a mass group to an event!
cons: RSVP for 50 on the free version - would be great to have it increased.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: i was pleased with the ability to cover all bases in an efficient way
author: Rob R.
pros: How easy it makes it for the user. covers all the bases
cons: it was tough to edit the backgrounds. overall good tho
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Very helpful event creating app, saved me a lot of time!
author: lirim S.
pros: EventCreate has been a great assistant to me. I created events for my group at work for a couple of events. I could add the people to the list, customize the seats, and more. Everyone says I am very good at managing the events.
cons: Everything is easy to use and straight forward. No cons to this app. Keep it up.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: This has been a game changer! I am so happy with this product, especially since the world shifted and we all had to quickly learn what events would look like virtually. We started hosting more training sessions and smaller events more often and this site has made it so easy to do!
author: Liz S.
pros: I have used many other sites in the past - ranging from large-scale sites that cost thousands for basically the same thing as this one, except this was MUCH easier to use! I have already suggested other coworkers from sister companies use it too! The easiest thing about this is that it's mostly drag and drop type design and you are always able to go back and add in more or less. I appreciate that I can add links to social media and our website. I can bring in video clips and even have an interactive map that will show guests where evening events are. Across the board for small or large-scale events, this is the best site to use!
cons: There have been a few times that I wish I was able to change something or add in something different than what was available, however, the team has always been more than happy to help get me what I need and there are many options to design and edit to make it your own.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: I am very happy I found EventCreate. It made creating and sending out the registration so easy. I am also able to track invitees and stay organized especially with seating and adding guests.
author: Kristine S.
pros: EventCreat is extremely easy to use and I can create clean, professional, and beautiful invitations. Their list of options helps me to ask my invitees the right questions and stay organized. The cost is also super reasonable!
cons: I cannot think of anything I did not like about EventCreate.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Jahzeel R.
pros: I like that I can create multiple assets for my event in one place. Collecting all the data from attendees, tickets and reservations all one page. Adding to that the ability to create a website that can contain the info and all I need for the audience to know about the event including the registration.
cons: I have not complaints about the page. I just have one thing I wish we can easily have wish is Digital Wallets payments.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: This was the first service to appear in my online search for RSVP management, but after a quick review of their website I discovered it was very user-friendly and super easy to customize my RSVP website. I was able to add my own images to maintain brand identity. I could quickly and easy easily add my own and change the font to create a professional looking website for our customers to use!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I liked how easy it was to quicky and efficiently set up an account and then create an event. I needed as service to keep track of RSVP's and I love that will do that and much more for a small fee, saving me a ton of time and resources.
cons: I did not like that it stated it was free and allowed me to register and even create an event, but I could not save it until I paid for a subscription.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy Setup and Management of Events, Tickets and Registrations
description: We currently manage two EventCreate accounts. We appreciated the ease of managing one of our most recent registration-required events.
author: Diaraha M.
pros: EventCreate is a user-friendly application that appears to have been developed for events and companies of various sizes. It is quick and easy to get started and does not require much maintenance.
cons: For those unfamiliar with setting up a website, though this has a simple interface, it may be a bit of a learning curve - be patient as you learn how to set up the pages.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I am using this software to create a webpage for my upcoming virtual college graduation party. I like that this software has been extremely user-friendly. I have worked with other website-building software and was able to quickly figure out any nuances with EventCreate, however I believe it would have been nearly as easy if I were new to web design. This product has just the right amount of features that the average person may need to publish and promote an event. In particular, this website is useful for keeping your event participants updated, as well as for linking a gift registry so I do not have to ask my attendees to keep track of multiple links. Best of all, the free trial access and ability to preview my page before I invested gave me the confidence I needed to commit to this software. And cost is amazing for me at only $4/month! (After the free trial period, the cost is automatically charged to the credit card to cover a year's worth of service.) Even if I use it only once this year (which I won't), I feel I am getting my money's worth. Highly recommend!
cons: If I absolutely MUST choose to list a "con" about this software: I did not like that the monthly subscription was so disproportional to the annual fee, but it is not a big deal because the annual fee is still a great price even if I only needed service for a short time.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
